changes.before: "Were you the only grain seller on this stretch?" / "For years... Lately there's been another, a younger fellow..." / "That matched Miri's memory closely enough to keep, though it gave her little else."
changes.after: "The road south. Passable for mounted riders?"

changes.before: Neral mounted with Miri and rode north before the trader arrived.
changes.after: Neral settles Miri in front of the saddle, the trader arrives before departure, and Neral rides north only after the road-contact exchange.
